title: Update mentor name from Omkar to Onkar

requirements.summary: Change mentor name from 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir' in the About component
acceptanceCriteria: The mentors section displays 'Onkar sir' instead of 'Omkar sir'
All other mentor names (Debadip sir, Hari sir) remain unchanged
The visual layout and styling of the mentors section remains intact

file_operations.description: Update the mentor name from 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir' in the mentors list array. Locate the mentors data structure and change the name field for the mentor currently named 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir'. Ensure no other mentor names or component structure are modified.
